description: Config-only change - single .go-version file with no code imports at all
rationale: Single file changed: .go-version (1 line: version string bump from 1.26.0 to 1.26.1). No imports, no code, no library references. Path classification: .go-version = config domain (dotfile version config). Semantic import analysis has nothing to analyze - no imports exist. Falls back entirely to path-based classification. 1 domain = PASS.
notes: Pure path-only fallback case. File contains only a version string - no imports, no code structure to analyze semantically. Verifies that the semantic analyzer gracefully handles files with zero parseable imports and does not interfere with path classification.
